title: Action hints on ALL doctor checks
description: Per R19: every doctor check message MUST include actionable next step. Audit all check definitions; add action_hint field where missing. Aligns with R11/R24 contract: AI consumers can execute the hint as a CLI command or know the manual fix path.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — UX + AI-consumability for all doctor output

files.change: Audit all check definitions; ensure action_hint field present and actionable; centralize via DoctorCheck type extension
Add test: every emitted check has non-empty action_hint

criteria: Every doctor check has actionable action_hint
Test enforces action_hint presence (no empty strings)
Hints align with FabricError actionHint contract (Q3)
